title: write_smt2: Check for constant bool after fully resolving signal

features.name: reduction result assigned to wider wire with bit-select
features.description: Code should include a reduction operator result assigned to a wire of larger width, where a bit-select of the constant upper portion is used

features.name: output port driven by constant bit of reduction result
features.description: Code should include an output port assigned from a bit-select of a reduction operator result where that bit is always constant zero
